task: B3: wire the missing GL posting for the employee-loan / cash-advance disbursement on the existing 0138 driver_finance ledger. Adds a 'driver_advance' posting source type and a role-gated, audited, user-settable posting_date (document date). B5 calls the loan-create entry point later.
details: REUSE the 0138 driver_finance stack (driver_liabilities + deduction_schedule + driver_advances) — no new ledger. createDriverCashAdvanceCore gains an optional liability_type (default 'advance', existing behavior unchanged); createEmployeeLoanCore books type='loan' with no linked bill (the no-trip/no-bill fallback).

Posting engine gains a 'driver_advance' source type + buildDriverAdvanceLines (Design 2): reads driver_finance.driver_advances directly → DEBIT QBO-149 Driver Cash Advance receivable (via B1 resolver, no hardcoding) / CREDIT creditAccountId (else company-default cash). Posts ONLY when disbursement_status='disbursed'. amount numeric dollars -> cents. assertBalanced + central transaction_source_links spine unchanged.

Migration 202606130445 adds driver_finance.driver_advances.posting_date (date, user-settable document/book date). Editable + role-gated via isOwnerOrAdmin (reused, not invented) + audited old/new via appendCrudAudit. disburseDriverAdvanceCore flips approved->disbursed, stamps disbursed_at + posting_date, then posts. editDriverAdvancePostingDate corrects it pre-disbursement (locked 409 after, no book divergence).

Two-date model (QBO-parity, Option A, zero extra DDL): document date = driver_advances.posting_date; matched/real date = bank.reconciliation_matches.matched_at (+ bank-txn date), stamped by the existing Banking matcher on the JE. The disbursement is already matchable as ledger_entry_kind='je' (match.service.ts discovers accounting.journal_entries) and attributable via transaction_source_links linked_object_type='driver_advance'. No bank_matched_date column added.

Validated: 9/9 unit tests (existing createDriverCashAdvanceCore unchanged, GL post additive + balanced, posting_date honored incl. back-date, role gate 403, audit old/new, edit lock 409); typecheck 0; CI_MIGRATION_TEST=1 verify:db:reset exit 0.
